---
title: "Home"
---

| | |
| --- | --- |
| ![](ME.JPEG) | Hi, I’m Ran Xin Jiang (pronounced “ran-sing”). <br> <br> I’m a first-generation college student pursuing an M.S. in Information Systems (Data Analytics) at Baruch College’s Zicklin School of Business, and I recently graduated from the University at Buffalo with a B.S. in Information Technology & Management. 

Through my academic and professional experiences, I have worked on projects involving data analysis, systems implementation, and technology-driven process improvement. My internship experience includes supporting the migration of 100+ LMS training courses at MJHS Health System, analyzing platform usage gaps at Houghton Mifflin Harcourt, and contributing to project planning initiatives at Blackstone LaunchPad.

I am currently seeking full-time opportunities beginning in August 2026 where I can continue developing my experience in analytics, technology operations, and process improvement within organizational environments.


## Let's Connect 
* [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ranxin-jiang/)
* [GitHub](https://github.com/rxjiang12)
